title: Mari
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Mari Post by Redtophat » Thu Nov 29, 2012 5:02 pm Well I haven't seen nor read much spoilers and am making a new topic here because I want to avoid all these save one. Can someone who's seen the film tell me if Mari has received actual development in this film or at least added depth to her character beyond the simple "Hot-Blooded" mecha character that she was shown to be in 2.0? Just a yes or no would suffice, although an explanation of the nature of her development and how she has any bearing on the overall plot with being as spoiler free as possible would be nice. Thanks ya'll. You forgot to mark your thread as No Spoilers. - Staff
